ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَيَنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ كَانُوٓا۟ أَشَدَّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةً وَأَثَارُوا۟ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَعَمَرُوهَآ أَكْثَرَ مِمَّا عَمَرُوهَا وَجَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ فَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ لِيَظْلِمَهُمْ وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not traveled through the earth and observed how was the end of those before them? They were greater than them in power, and they plowed [or excavated] the earth and built it up more than they [i.e., the Makkans] have built it up, and their messengers came to them with clear evidences. targetTranslation: he was (describes the state of عٰقِبَةَ)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ عٰقِبَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟ ٱلسُّوٓأَىٰٓ أَن كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَكَانُوا۟ بِهَا يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then the end of those who did evil was the worst [consequence] because they denied the signs of Allāh and used to ridicule them.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ عٰقِبَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟ ٱلسُّوٓأَىٰٓ أَن كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَكَانُوا۟ بِهَا يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then the end of those who did evil was the worst [consequence] because they denied the signs of Allāh and used to ridicule them.

targetTranslation: Allah (The One True God who is the subject of يَبْدَؤُا۟ - He begins)
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh begins creation; then He will repeat it; then to Him you will be returned.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh begins creation; then He will repeat it; then to Him you will be returned.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh begins creation; then He will repeat it; then to Him you will be returned.

targetTranslation: you all are being returned (to إِلَيْهِ - to Him)
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh begins creation; then He will repeat it; then to Him you will be returned.

targetTranslation: it/she stands/rises (subject of الساعة - the Hour)
ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ يُبْلِسُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will be in despair.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ يُبْلِسُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will be in despair.

ayahArabic: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُم مِّن شُرَكَآئِهِمْ شُفَعٰٓؤُا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ كٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And there will not be for them among their [alleged] partners any intercessors, and they will [then] be disbelievers in their partners.

targetTranslation: their partners/associates (partners of the disbelievers mentioned in كَانُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ كٰفِرِينَ)
ayahArabic: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُم مِّن شُرَكَآئِهِمْ شُفَعٰٓؤُا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ كٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And there will not be for them among their [alleged] partners any intercessors, and they will [then] be disbelievers in their partners.

ayahArabic: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُم مِّن شُرَكَآئِهِمْ شُفَعٰٓؤُا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ كٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And there will not be for them among their [alleged] partners any intercessors, and they will [then] be disbelievers in their partners.

ayahArabic: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُم مِّن شُرَكَآئِهِمْ شُفَعٰٓؤُا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ كٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And there will not be for them among their [alleged] partners any intercessors, and they will [then] be disbelievers in their partners.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَفَرَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the Day the Hour appears - that Day they will become separated.

targetTranslation: on that day (when the Hour occurs)
ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَفَرَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the Day the Hour appears - that Day they will become separated.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَفَرَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the Day the Hour appears - that Day they will become separated.

ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ فَهُمْ فِى رَوْضَةٍ يُحْبَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And as for those who had believed and done righteous deeds, they will be in a garden [of Paradise], delighted.

targetTranslation: they believed (connected to الَّذِينَ - those who)
ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ فَهُمْ فِى رَوْضَةٍ يُحْبَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And as for those who had believed and done righteous deeds, they will be in a garden [of Paradise], delighted.

targetTranslation: in a garden (connected to فِى before it)
ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ فَهُمْ فِى رَوْضَةٍ يُحْبَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And as for those who had believed and done righteous deeds, they will be in a garden [of Paradise], delighted.

targetTranslation: they are being delighted (refers to الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا in this ayah)
ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ فَهُمْ فِى رَوْضَةٍ يُحْبَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And as for those who had believed and done righteous deeds, they will be in a garden [of Paradise], delighted.

ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَلِقَآئِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But as for those who disbelieved and denied Our verses and the meeting of the Hereafter, those will be brought into the punishment [to remain].

ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَلِقَآئِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But as for those who disbelieved and denied Our verses and the meeting of the Hereafter, those will be brought into the punishment [to remain].

targetTranslation: those who are made present (male plural doers)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَلِقَآئِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But as for those who disbelieved and denied Our verses and the meeting of the Hereafter, those will be brought into the punishment [to remain].

ayahArabic: فَسُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: So exalted is Allāh when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning.

ayahArabic: فَسُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: So exalted is Allāh when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning.

ayahArabic: فَسُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: So exalted is Allāh when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning.

ayahArabic: فَسُبْحٰنَ ٱللَّهِ حِينَ تُمْسُونَ وَحِينَ تُصْبِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: So exalted is Allāh when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning.

ayahArabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَعَشِيًّا وَحِينَ تُظْهِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him is [due all] praise throughout the heavens and the earth. And [exalted is He] at night and when you are at noon.

targetTranslation: he makes (something) exit (subject of يُخْرِجُ ٱلْحَىَّ)
ayahArabic: يُخْرِجُ ٱلْحَىَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَيِّتِ وَيُخْرِجُ ٱلْمَيِّتَ مِنَ ٱلْحَىِّ وَيُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. And thus will you be brought out.

ayahArabic: يُخْرِجُ ٱلْحَىَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَيِّتِ وَيُخْرِجُ ٱلْمَيِّتَ مِنَ ٱلْحَىِّ وَيُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. And thus will you be brought out.

targetTranslation: its death (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
ayahArabic: يُخْرِجُ ٱلْحَىَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَيِّتِ وَيُخْرِجُ ٱلْمَيِّتَ مِنَ ٱلْحَىِّ وَيُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. And thus will you be brought out.

ayahArabic: يُخْرِجُ ٱلْحَىَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَيِّتِ وَيُخْرِجُ ٱلْمَيِّتَ مِنَ ٱلْحَىِّ وَيُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا وَكَذٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: He brings the living out of the dead and brings the dead out of the living and brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. And thus will you be brought out.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ إِذَآ أَنتُم بَشَرٌ تَنتَشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ إِذَآ أَنتُم بَشَرٌ تَنتَشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].

targetTranslation: dust/soil (as an indefinite substance, referring to what humans were created from)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ إِذَآ أَنتُم بَشَرٌ تَنتَشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ إِذَآ أَنتُم بَشَرٌ تَنتَشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ إِذَآ أَنتُم بَشَرٌ تَنتَشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍ ثُمَّ إِذَآ أَنتُم بَشَرٌ تَنتَشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

targetTranslation: your selves (referring to all of you)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

targetTranslation: between you all (referring to the spouses mentioned earlier in the ayah)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

targetTranslation: love (as something Allah places between spouses)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

targetTranslation: that (pointing to what was mentioned before)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ خَلْقُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱخْتِلٰفُ أَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَأَلْوٰنِكُمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّلْعٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ خَلْقُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱخْتِلٰفُ أَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَأَلْوٰنِكُمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّلْعٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge.

targetTranslation: your tongues (part of وَٱخْتِلٰفُ أَلْسِنَتِكُمْ - and the diversity of your tongues)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ خَلْقُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱخْتِلٰفُ أَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَأَلْوٰنِكُمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّلْعٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge.

targetTranslation: that (pointing to what was mentioned before)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ خَلْقُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱخْتِلٰفُ أَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَأَلْوٰنِكُمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّلْعٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth and the diversity of your languages and your colors. Indeed in that are signs for those of knowledge.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ مَنَامُكُم بِٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ وَٱبْتِغَآؤُكُم مِّن فَضْلِهِۦٓ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَسْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is your sleep by night and day and your seeking of His bounty. Indeed in that are signs for a people who listen.

targetTranslation: your sleep (referring to all people being addressed)

ayahEnglish: And of His signs is your sleep by night and day and your seeking of His bounty. Indeed in that are signs for a people who listen.

targetTranslation: that (showing distance when speaking to one person)

ayahEnglish: And of His signs is your sleep by night and day and your seeking of His bounty. Indeed in that are signs for a people who listen.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ يُرِيكُمُ ٱلْبَرْقَ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا وَيُنَزِّلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَيُحْىِۦ بِهِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَآ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is [that] He shows you the lightning [causing] fear and aspiration, and He sends down rain from the sky by which He brings to life the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed in that are signs for a people who use reason.

targetTranslation: he shows you all (object of يُرِيكُمُ in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ يُرِيكُمُ ٱلْبَرْقَ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا وَيُنَزِّلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَيُحْىِۦ بِهِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَآ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ

targetTranslation: they use reason (referring to people who reflect on Allah's signs)
ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ يُرِيكُمُ ٱلْبَرْقَ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا وَيُنَزِّلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَيُحْىِۦ بِهِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَآ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَن تَقُومَ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ بِأَمْرِهِۦ ثُمَّ إِذَا دَعَاكُمْ دَعْوَةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ إِذَآ أَنتُمْ تَخْرُجُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that the heaven and earth stand [i.e., remain] by His command. Then when He calls you with a [single] call from the earth, immediately you will come forth.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَن تَقُومَ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ بِأَمْرِهِۦ ثُمَّ إِذَا دَعَاكُمْ دَعْوَةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ إِذَآ أَنتُمْ تَخْرُجُونَ

targetTranslation: when (followed by دَعَاكُمْ - He calls you)

ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ كُلٌّ لَّهُۥ قٰنِتُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and earth. All are to Him devoutly obedient.

ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ كُلٌّ لَّهُۥ قٰنِتُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and earth. All are to Him devoutly obedient.

ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ كُلٌّ لَّهُۥ قٰنِتُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and earth. All are to Him devoutly obedient.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَهُوَ أَهْوَنُ عَلَيْهِ وَلَهُ ٱلْمَثَلُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who begins creation; then He repeats it, and that is [even] easier for Him. To Him belongs the highest description [i.e., attribute] in the heavens and earth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَهُوَ أَهْوَنُ عَلَيْهِ وَلَهُ ٱلْمَثَلُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who begins creation; then He repeats it, and that is [even] easier for Him. To Him belongs the highest description [i.e., attribute] in the heavens and earth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

ayahEnglish: And it is He who begins creation; then He repeats it, and that is [even] easier for Him. To Him belongs the highest description [i.e., attribute] in the heavens and earth. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

targetTranslation: he presented (an example for لَكُم - for you)
ayahArabic: ضَرَبَ لَكُم مَّثَلًا مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ هَل لَّكُم مِّن مَّا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمٰنُكُم مِّن شُرَكَآءَ فِى مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ فَأَنتُمْ فِيهِ سَوَآءٌ تَخَافُونَهُمْ كَخِيفَتِكُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ كَذٰلِكَ نُفَصِّلُ ٱلْءَايٰتِ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: He presents to you an example from yourselves. Do you have among those whom your right hands possess [i.e., slaves] any partners in what We have provided for you so that you are equal therein [and] would fear them as your fear of one another [within a partnership]? Thus do We detail the verses for a people who use reason.

ayahArabic: ضَرَبَ لَكُم مَّثَلًا مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ هَل لَّكُم مِّن مَّا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمٰنُكُم مِّن شُرَكَآءَ فِى مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ فَأَنتُمْ فِيهِ سَوَآءٌ تَخَافُونَهُمْ كَخِيفَتِكُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ كَذٰلِكَ نُفَصِّلُ ٱلْءَايٰتِ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ

ayahArabic: ضَرَبَ لَكُم مَّثَلًا مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ هَل لَّكُم مِّن مَّا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمٰنُكُم مِّن شُرَكَآءَ فِى مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ فَأَنتُمْ فِيهِ سَوَآءٌ تَخَافُونَهُمْ كَخِيفَتِكُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ كَذٰلِكَ نُفَصِّلُ ٱلْءَايٰتِ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: He presents to you an example from yourselves. Do you have among those whom your right hands possess [i.e., slaves] any partners in what We have provided for you so that you are equal therein [and] would fear them as your fear of one another [within a partnership]? Thus do We detail the verses for a people who use reason.

ayahArabic: بَلِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُم بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ فَمَن يَهْدِى مَنْ أَضَلَّ ٱللَّهُ وَمَا لَهُم مِّن نَّاصِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: But those who wrong follow their [own] desires without knowledge. Then who can guide one whom Allāh has sent astray? And for them there are no helpers.

ayahArabic: فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ حَنِيفًا فِطْرَتَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِى فَطَرَ ٱلنَّاسَ عَلَيْهَا لَا تَبْدِيلَ لِخَلْقِ ٱللَّهِ ذٰلِكَ ٱلدِّينُ ٱلْقَيِّمُ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the religion, inclining to truth. [Adhere to] the fiṭrah of Allāh upon which He has created [all] people. No change should there be in the creation of Allāh. That is the correct religion, but most of the people do not know.

targetTranslation: as one who turns away from falsehood (describes how to أَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ)

ayahArabic: مُنِيبِينَ إِلَيْهِ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Adhere to it], turning in repentance to Him, and fear Him and establish prayer and do not be of those who associate others with Allāh

ayahEnglish: [Adhere to it], turning in repentance to Him, and fear Him and establish prayer and do not be of those who associate others with Allāh

ayahArabic: مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ فَرَّقُوا۟ دِينَهُمْ وَكَانُوا۟ شِيَعًا كُلُّ حِزْبٍۭ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ فَرِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Or] of those who have divided their religion and become sects, every faction rejoicing in what it has.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلنَّاسَ ضُرٌّ دَعَوْا۟ رَبَّهُم مُّنِيبِينَ إِلَيْهِ ثُمَّ إِذَآ أَذَاقَهُم مِّنْهُ رَحْمَةً إِذَا فَرِيقٌ مِّنْهُم بِرَبِّهِمْ يُشْرِكُونَ

ayahEnglish: So that they will deny what We have granted them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know.

ayahEnglish: So that they will deny what We have granted them. Then enjoy yourselves, for you are going to know.

ayahArabic: أَمْ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطٰنًا فَهُوَ يَتَكَلَّمُ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have We sent down to them an authority [i.e., a proof or scripture], and it speaks of what they have been associating with Him?

ayahArabic: وَإِذَآ أَذَقْنَا ٱلنَّاسَ رَحْمَةً فَرِحُوا۟ بِهَا وَإِن تُصِبْهُمْ سَيِّئَةٌۢ بِمَا قَدَّمَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ إِذَا هُمْ يَقْنَطُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when We let the people taste mercy, they rejoice therein, but if evil afflicts them for what their hands have put forth, immediately they despair.

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَبْسُطُ ٱلرِّزْقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَقْدِرُ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that Allāh extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.

ayahArabic: فَـَٔاتِ ذَا ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ حَقَّهُۥ وَٱلْمِسْكِينَ وَٱبْنَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ ذٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ لِّلَّذِينَ يُرِيدُونَ وَجْهَ ٱللَّهِ وَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: So give the relative his right, as well as the needy and the traveler. That is best for those who desire the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh, and it is they who will be the successful.

ayahArabic: فَـَٔاتِ ذَا ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ حَقَّهُۥ وَٱلْمِسْكِينَ وَٱبْنَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ ذٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ لِّلَّذِينَ يُرِيدُونَ وَجْهَ ٱللَّهِ وَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: So give the relative his right, as well as the needy and the traveler. That is best for those who desire the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh, and it is they who will be the successful.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ ءَاتَيْتُم مِّن رِّبًا لِّيَرْبُوَا۟ فِىٓ أَمْوٰلِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَلَا يَرْبُوا۟ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَمَآ ءَاتَيْتُم مِّن زَكَوٰةٍ تُرِيدُونَ وَجْهَ ٱللَّهِ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُضْعِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: And whatever you give for interest [i.e., advantage] to increase within the wealth of people will not increase with Allāh. But what you give in zakāh, desiring the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh - those are the multipliers.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ ثُمَّ رَزَقَكُمْ ثُمَّ يُمِيتُكُمْ ثُمَّ يُحْيِيكُمْ هَلْ مِن شُرَكَآئِكُم مَّن يَفْعَلُ مِن ذٰلِكُم مِّن شَىْءٍ سُبْحٰنَهُۥ وَتَعٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh is the one who created you, then provided for you, then will cause you to die, and then will give you life. Are there any of your "partners" who does anything of that? Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.

ayahArabic: ظَهَرَ ٱلْفَسَادُ فِى ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ أَيْدِى ٱلنَّاسِ لِيُذِيقَهُم بَعْضَ ٱلَّذِى عَمِلُوا۟ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Corruption has appeared throughout the land and sea by [reason of] what the hands of people have earned so He [i.e., Allāh] may let them taste part of [the consequence of] what they have done that perhaps they will return [to righteousness].

ayahArabic: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلُ كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّشْرِكِينَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of those before. Most of them were associators [of others with Allāh].

ayahArabic: فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ ٱلْقَيِّمِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصَّدَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allāh of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided.

targetTranslation: a day (subject of لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ)
ayahArabic: فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ ٱلْقَيِّمِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصَّدَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allāh of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided.

targetTranslation: place/time of return (no return possible from يَوْمٌ - that Day)
ayahArabic: فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ ٱلْقَيِّمِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصَّدَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allāh of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided.

ayahArabic: فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ ٱلْقَيِّمِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصَّدَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allāh of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided.

targetTranslation: on that day (when they will split up)
ayahArabic: فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ ٱلْقَيِّمِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصَّدَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allāh of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided.

targetTranslation: they (all) become completely divided (into separate groups)
ayahArabic: فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ ٱلْقَيِّمِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصَّدَّعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So direct your face [i.e., self] toward the correct religion before a Day comes from Allāh of which there is no repelling. That Day, they will be divided.

ayahArabic: مَن كَفَرَ فَعَلَيْهِ كُفْرُهُۥ وَمَنْ عَمِلَ صٰلِحًا فَلِأَنفُسِهِمْ يَمْهَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Whoever disbelieves - upon him is [the consequence of] his disbelief. And whoever does righteousness - they are for themselves preparing,

ayahArabic: مَن كَفَرَ فَعَلَيْهِ كُفْرُهُۥ وَمَنْ عَمِلَ صٰلِحًا فَلِأَنفُسِهِمْ يَمْهَدُونَ

ayahArabic: لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ مِن فَضْلِهِۦٓ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: That He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out of His bounty. Indeed, He does not like the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ مِن فَضْلِهِۦٓ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: That He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out of His bounty. Indeed, He does not like the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ مِن فَضْلِهِۦٓ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: That He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out of His bounty. Indeed, He does not like the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ مِن فَضْلِهِۦٓ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: That He may reward those who have believed and done righteous deeds out of His bounty. Indeed, He does not like the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَن يُرْسِلَ ٱلرِّيَاحَ مُبَشِّرٰتٍ وَلِيُذِيقَكُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَلِتَجْرِىَ ٱلْفُلْكُ بِأَمْرِهِۦ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He sends the winds as bringers of good tidings and to let you taste His mercy [i.e., rain] and so the ships may sail at His command and so you may seek of His bounty, and perhaps you will be grateful.

ayahArabic: وَمِنْ ءَايٰتِهِۦٓ أَن يُرْسِلَ ٱلرِّيَاحَ مُبَشِّرٰتٍ وَلِيُذِيقَكُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَلِتَجْرِىَ ٱلْفُلْكُ بِأَمْرِهِۦ وَلِتَبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And of His signs is that He sends the winds as bringers of good tidings and to let you taste His mercy [i.e., rain] and so the ships may sail at His command and so you may seek of His bounty, and perhaps you will be grateful.

targetTranslation: We sent (connected to وَلَقَدْ before it)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِمْ فَجَآءُوهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ وَكَانَ حَقًّا عَلَيْنَا نَصْرُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already sent messengers before you to their peoples, and they came to them with clear evidences; then We took retribution from those who committed crimes, and incumbent upon Us was support of the believers.

targetTranslation: before you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِمْ فَجَآءُوهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ وَكَانَ حَقًّا عَلَيْنَا نَصْرُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already sent messengers before you to their peoples, and they came to them with clear evidences; then We took retribution from those who committed crimes, and incumbent upon Us was support of the believers.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيٰحَ فَتُثِيرُ سَحَابًا فَيَبْسُطُهُۥ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيْفَ يَشَآءُ وَيَجْعَلُهُۥ كِسَفًا فَتَرَى ٱلْوَدْقَ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ خِلٰلِهِۦ فَإِذَآ أَصَابَ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦٓ إِذَا هُمْ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is Allāh who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds and spread them in the sky however He wills, and He makes them fragments so you see the rain emerge from within them. And when He causes it to fall upon whom He wills of His servants, immediately they rejoice

ayahArabic: فَٱنظُرْ إِلَىٰٓ ءَاثٰرِ رَحْمَتِ ٱللَّهِ كَيْفَ يُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَآ إِنَّ ذٰلِكَ لَمُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
ayahEnglish: So observe the effects of the mercy of Allāh - how He gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. Indeed, that [same one] will give life to the dead, and He is over all things competent.

targetTranslation: we sent (followed by رِيحًا - a wind)
ayahArabic: وَلَئِنْ أَرْسَلْنَا رِيحًا فَرَأَوْهُ مُصْفَرًّا لَّظَلُّوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ يَكْفُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But if We should send a [bad] wind and they saw [their crops] turned yellow, they would remain thereafter disbelievers.

ayahArabic: وَلَئِنْ أَرْسَلْنَا رِيحًا فَرَأَوْهُ مُصْفَرًّا لَّظَلُّوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ يَكْفُرُونَ

ayahArabic: وَلَئِنْ أَرْسَلْنَا رِيحًا فَرَأَوْهُ مُصْفَرًّا لَّظَلُّوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ يَكْفُرُونَ

ayahArabic: فَإِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: So indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they turn their backs, retreating.

targetTranslation: you make hear (addressing Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
ayahArabic: فَإِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: So indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they turn their backs, retreating.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهٰدِ ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلٰلَتِهِمْ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [in submission to Allāh].

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُم مِّن ضَعْفٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ضَعْفٍ قُوَّةً ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ قُوَّةٍ ضَعْفًا وَشَيْبَةً يَخْلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْقَدِيرُ
ayahEnglish: Allāh is the one who created you from weakness, then made after weakness strength, then made after strength weakness and white hair. He creates what He wills, and He is the Knowing, the Competent.

targetTranslation: The one who (connects Allah to خَلَقَكُم/created you)

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ تَقُومُ ٱلسَّاعَةُ يُقْسِمُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ مَا لَبِثُوا۟ غَيْرَ سَاعَةٍ كَذٰلِكَ كَانُوا۟ يُؤْفَكُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the Day the Hour appears the criminals will swear they had remained but an hour. Thus they were deluded.

targetTranslation: those who (subject of أُوتُوا - were given)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ وَٱلْإِيمٰنَ لَقَدْ لَبِثْتُمْ فِى كِتٰبِ ٱللَّهِ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْبَعْثِ فَهٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْبَعْثِ وَلٰكِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: But those who were given knowledge and faith will say, "You remained the extent of Allāh's decree until the Day of Resurrection, and this is the Day of Resurrection, but you did not used to know."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ وَٱلْإِيمٰنَ لَقَدْ لَبِثْتُمْ فِى كِتٰبِ ٱللَّهِ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْبَعْثِ فَهٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْبَعْثِ وَلٰكِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ

ayahArabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يَنفَعُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ مَعْذِرَتُهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُسْتَعْتَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So that Day, their excuse will not benefit those who wronged, nor will they be asked to appease [Allāh].

targetTranslation: we presented (examples to الناس - the people)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ضَرَبْنَا لِلنَّاسِ فِى هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن كُلِّ مَثَلٍ وَلَئِن جِئْتَهُم بِـَٔايَةٍ لَّيَقُولَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا مُبْطِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly presented to the people in this Qur’ān from every [kind of] example. But, [O Muḥammad], if you should bring them a sign, the disbelievers will surely say, "You [believers] are but falsifiers."

targetTranslation: he seals/stamps (subject of this ayah is اللَّهُ)
ayahArabic: كَذٰلِكَ يَطْبَعُ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Thus does Allāh seal the hearts of those who do not know.

targetTranslation: Allah (as the subject of يَطْبَعُ - seals)

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ وَلَا يَسْتَخِفَّنَّكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: So be patient. Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth. And let them not disquiet you who are not certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ وَلَا يَسْتَخِفَّنَّكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُوقِنُونَ
